summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Building Assessment UI component. All features work correctly: assessment type switching, building records table CRUD, auto-computation of market values, form enable/disable based on edit mode, Structure and Adjustment sub-tabs with CRUD capabilities.

issues: React hydration warnings about span elements as children of select/option - not affecting functionality but should be cleaned up

passed_tests: Assessment tab shows three assessment type buttons (Land, Building, Machinery)
Building Assessment button is selected by default and shows the Building Assessment component
Building records table displays with correct columns (Kind, Class, Actual Use, Sub Class, Area, Unit Value, Base Market Value, Adjusted Market Value, Assessment Level, Assessed Value, Taxability)
Can select a building row by clicking on it - form populates with row data
Add button works - enables form for new record entry
Edit button works - enables form for editing selected record
Delete button works - removes selected record with confirmation dialog
Save button works - saves new or edited record to table
Cancel button works - exits edit mode and reverts form
Form inputs are disabled when not in edit mode
Form inputs are enabled when in edit mode (after clicking Edit or Add)
Auto-computation of Base Market Value works correctly (Area × Unit Value)
Auto-computation of Adjusted Market Value works correctly (Base Market Value × Assessment Level / 100)
Assessed Value displays correctly
Checkboxes for Taxable, Beneficial Use, Idle Land are present and functional
Structure sub-tab shows structure records with proper columns (Structure Type, Material, Percentage, Value)
Structure sub-tab has Add/Edit/Delete buttons
Adjustment sub-tab shows adjustment records with proper columns (Adjustment Type, Percentage, Value)
Adjustment sub-tab has Add/Edit/Delete buttons
Can switch between Structure and Adjustment tabs
Can switch between Land, Building, and Machinery assessment types
Land and Machinery assessment types show placeholder content (modules to be implemented)
critical_code_review_comments: Building Assessment component is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
Auto-computation uses useEffect with appropriate dependencies - clean implementation
Structure and Adjustment sub-tabs properly receive buildingId and isFormEnabled props
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Form validation could be enhanced - currently allows empty fields to be saved
seed_data_creation: None required - app uses default mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Building Assessment component fully tested and working. All CRUD operations work correctly. Auto-computation formulas verified: Base Market Value = Area × Unit Value, Adjusted Market Value = Base Market Value × (Assessment Level / 100). Structure tab has 3 mock records (Foundation, Columns, Roof), Adjustment tab has 1 mock record (Depreciation). Land and Machinery assessment types show placeholder content.
mocked_api_note: MOCKED - All data is stored in React state only. No backend API calls for building assessment data.
